seeded_from: FIRST CNN-only run (piff_fpc_cnn_v1, Sanaa order 2026-07-22) — exploratory card: thresholds are pathology floors, NOT science gates
note: train_cnn.py stdout reuses the piff grammar with two documented substitutions: the 'val NLL' slot carries the STANDARDIZED VAL MSE (the selection scalar, healthy range O(1) falling toward ~0.1), and the 'zeta_ls' slot carries FiLM |dgamma| (conditioning ACTIVITY, starts 0.000 by identity init — the conditioning_inert trigger reading 0.6931 can never fire; |dgamma| rising off 0 is the healthy signal).

milestones.gate: exploratory floor; the science read is the per-member eval_cnn table, not this number

triggers.explode: any non-finite val loss/RMSE/R2 in the log line (trainer also self-aborts, exit 9, after 2 consecutive)
triggers.collapse: val R2 < 0.02 for 10 consecutive epochs after ep 5 (constant-mean prediction)
triggers.planb: n/a for the CNN-only model (no GP feature space)
triggers.nll_runaway: val loss > running_min + 0.5 for 10 consecutive epochs

kill_policy: monitor NEVER qdels; it emails verdicts. I14 qdel remains a supervisor action on evidence.
